_comment: Subjects + prompts for programmatic art generation. Add new ids here as you de-brand more content (see docs/WORLD_BIBLE.md). Filenames map to in-game ids; the runtime auto-discovers them via src/assetManifest.js.
style: Painterly storybook fantasy illustration, hand-painted texture, dramatic single-source rim lighting, misty atmosphere, deep teal and navy palette with warm ember-gold highlights, cohesive game art, no text, no watermark, original creature design that does not resemble any existing franchise

subjects.cindermaw: 3/4 portrait bust of a stocky boulder-bodied drake with cracked obsidian hide glowing with molten lava seams, rocky armoured back plates, short heavy wings, amber eyes
subjects.quilldart: 3/4 portrait bust of a sleek azure drake with a fan of glittering gold tail-quills and swept-back head spines, lean aerodynamic build, bright cyan eyes
subjects.pyrewing: 3/4 portrait bust of a fierce crimson drake wreathed in living flame, curved horns, broad wings mid-roar, glowing orange eyes

subjects.berk: wide cinematic establishing shot of a rugged cliffside harbour town (Holtgard) at dusk, longhouses and watchfires above a grey northern sea, no characters
subjects.dragons_edge: wide cinematic establishing shot of a lonely sea-stack outpost (Stormwatch Spire) wreathed in storm clouds, wooden platforms ringing a tall rock spire, no characters
